raw.message: スマートフォンを枕元に置いてポケモンと楽しく睡眠管理 今すぐダウンロード

hook.summary: A cute Fuecoco wakes up briefly before falling back into a deep sleep.
hook.visual_action: Fuecoco yawns and collapses back onto its belly in a cozy, dimly lit setting.

scene_flow: Fuecoco wakes up and falls back asleep in a cozy environment.
UI demonstration showing sleep tracking graphs and data on a smartphone.
A wide shot of various Pokémon sleeping around a Snorlax in a grassy field.
A close-up of a sleeping Charmander being recorded in the sleep dex.
Final logo reveal with App Store and Google Play download buttons.
on_screen_text: ポケモンと一緒に毎朝楽しく
No.4 ヒトカゲ / すやすや
audience_proxy: Pokémon fans of all ages who want to gamify their sleep routine and collect cute characters.
